- Route 53 resolves the custom domain to CloudFront (ACM TLS)

- Cookies, CSRF and SSE (text/event-stream) pass through uncached

- plus the Gateway (MCP tool Lambdas), Code Interpreter and Browser as tools

- S3 Vectors serves RAG similarity search to ground answers

- Rendered output is stored in S3 and served from a sandboxed CloudFront iframe

div.span: Solid: primary request / data flow
Bidirectional: read / write (Memory)
Dashed gray: auth, DNS and iframe embedding
